gate.label: 🚪 main gate
gate.message: The way out. It is locked tight.
gate.success: The key turns smoothly in the lock...
gate.fail: I need a key to unlock this gate.

library.name: The Library
library.description: Floor to ceiling shelves filled with forgotten knowledge.

bookshelf.label: 📚 bookshelf
bookshelf.click: One book falls open to a page about "Manor Secrets".

dustyCorner.label: Investigate dusty corner
dustyCorner.hover: Roll a d20 to Investigate dusty corner. Need 10+.
dustyCorner.success: Success! You uncover a heavy crowbar under the floorboards.

cellar.name: The Cellar
cellar.description: Cold, damp stone and the smell of ancient dust.

crate.label: 📦 wooden crate
crate.success: You pry it open and find the manor key!
crate.fail: It is nailed shut. I need a tool to pry it open.

looseStone.label: Examine loose stone
looseStone.success: You find a hidden compartment containing a silver coin!

webs.label: 🕸️ thick webs
webs.click: It looks like a small door.

ballroom.name: The Ballroom
ballroom.description: A warped, dusty ballroom. You can almost hear the echoes of music.

floorboards.label: Check floorboards
floorboards.success: You find a tarnished ring wedged between the boards!

study.name: The Study
study.description: A cluttered study filled with half finished letters.

desk.label: Search the desk
desk.success: You find a cryptic letter hidden in a secret compartment!

outro.line3: Click to return to the beginning.
